content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market participation with global risk-on (S&P +1.46%, Nasdaq +2.02%), defense/capital goods/financial services leading, FMCG & pharma firming on Q4 results. Existing book is positioned constructively across diversified sectors with most positions showing gains vs entries. Priority is to trail SLs on winners and avoid adding fresh cluster exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24500
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4%. Current SL 1035 is already above entry (locked-in gain ~5%). Trail-gap to CMP is ~2% which respects the 1% floor. HOLD existing levels — SL trails are monotonic and 1035 is the right level to defend pivot/R1 1051. No-op MODIFY avoided; emitting HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. SL 121 still appropriate. Gold spot rallied +3% on May 6 on US-Iran de-escalation reversibility; thesis intact as portfolio hedge. No SL change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. Current SL 1735 is already above entry (+2% locked). Trail-gap to CMP ~1.3% — respects 1% floor. Stock at fresh ATH, Nomura target 1930. No change needed; emitting HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Move SL from 4570 to 4575 (breakeven) — minimal but lock in entry. CRITICAL: HAL board meeting May 14 (Q4 FY26 results) is 5 sessions away — outside the 3-session binary cooldown but worth tightening into. Trail-gap 4575 vs CMP 4630 = 1.2%, respects floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. SL 6960 already above entry (+0.9% locked). Chemours Opteon AI cooling pact announced TODAY May 7 is fresh material catalyst. Trail-gap 6960 vs 7049 = 1.3%, respects 1% floor. No-op — emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. SL 820 = -2.1% from entry, within risk budget. Stock surged +9.84% today on rail rally + 10x volume. Q4 results pending in May — moderate binary risk. Hold SL at 820 (below today's low 830 leaves room) until clearer trend confirmation."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.1%. SL 365 = -1.1%, tight. Stock at fresh ATH today on Q4 PAT +31% follow-through. Trail-gap 365 vs 368.70 = 1.0%, exactly at floor. Hold current levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. SL 815 = -0.6% from entry. Stock hit ATH 843.15 today (sub-normal monsoon risk noted but Q4 print strong, +22% revenue). Trail-gap 815 vs 822 = 0.9% — slightly under 1% floor. Holding current levels rather than tightening further; emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. SL 1260 = +0.1% above entry (breakeven locked). Trail-gap 1260 vs 1279 = 1.5%, respects floor. Strong Q4 + Encora close catalyst. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. SL 3000 = -0.8% from entry. Defense rally +9.2% today. Trail-gap 3000 vs 3034 = 1.1%, respects floor. Hold current levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.2%. SL 798 = -1.0% from entry. Stock +10.46% gap today on Q4 results. Trail-gap 798 vs 807 = 1.2%, respects floor. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already locks in +5% above entry; trail-gap 2% to CMP 1056.70 respects floor. Tightening further to ~1040 risks self-stopout on normal chop. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Position essentially flat. Hold as portfolio hedge against geopolitical reversibility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1735 already locks +2% gain. Trail-gap 1.3%. Strong fundamentals + ATH; hold for target 1820."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL from 4570 to 4575 (breakeven). Board meeting May 14 (5 sessions away) — will revisit on Day 23 to consider event-trade discipline (3-session window)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry; fresh Chemours catalyst today. Hold for target 7400."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "reasoning": "SL leaves room for normal chop after 9.84% surge. Q4 results in May — monitor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL at -1.1%; ATH on Q4 beat. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "SL near entry; trail-gap slightly tight at 0.9% but tightening risks self-stopout. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakeven SL post Q4+Encora rally. Hold for 1330."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "Defense up-cycle thesis intact; SL respects floor. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-gap consolidation; SL respects floor. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BIOCON Q4 results TODAY — pure binary, NO new entry (FDA Form 483 + CEO transition + binary tonight = walk away). CHOLAHLDNG board meeting TOMORROW — also binary, skip. BAJAJ-AUTO buyback floor attractive but already passed on Day 10 with -₹570 loss; respect 5-session cooldown. LUPIN, AUROPHARMA, DABUR, HINDPETRO, POLYCAB, M&M, BHARATFORG, GABRIEL, NEULANDLAB, SRF, HDFCBANK — book is already at 11 positions across Financial Services (3), Capital Goods (3), Pharma/Chem, IT, FMCG, Services, ETF. Adding more would breach cluster discipline (Capital Goods cluster: HAL+TITAGARH+GRSE already 3 names; Financial Services: PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS already 3 names). NO NEW ENTRIES this session.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across 11 positions, deployed ~80% (within soft target). Most positions have SLs at or above breakeven — risk is well-controlled. Cumulative experiment P&L is -53.72% which reflects prior failure modes documented in system prompt; the current book represents the recovery phase with disciplined sizing and trailing SLs. Cluster check: Financial Services (PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS) and Capital Goods/Defense (HAL + TITAGARH + GRSE) are at the 3-name cluster ceiling — NO additions to either cluster. HFCL pending MIS BUY from 1947 minutes ago (>32 hours) is stale; it should have auto-cancelled at prior session close, but flagging for awareness. No new entries justified — quality of existing book + cluster caps + binary calendar (BIOCON today, CHOLAHLDNG tomorrow, HAL May 14) argues for management not addition."
}
